value.description:
A strange tale whispered among commonfolk: a towering stag with the bulk and hunger of a great bear, said to roam the wilds as one of Hircine’s chosen aspects. Some claim it is the spirit of the hunt given flesh, others that it is a mortal beast twisted by the Daedric Prince’s will.

Whatever its origin, those who cross its path quickly learn that prey and predator are merely roles in Hircine’s eternal game.

Those who emerge victorious may discover the rich, invigorating meat, and after consumption, often feel the thrill of the chase lingering in their blood.

An undelivered letter, could be valuable. 

To your majesty. 
The reports were true. 
The hunters we sent were taken in the night. 
What we believed to be some strange beast of the woods 
is no mere animal.


I tracked the great stag to its cave. 
An elegant creature with great horns, 
but with the bulk and hunger of a bear. 
The locals whisper it is an aspect of the Great Hunt.


I watched it drag down a soldier, not ours. 
The creature did not eat him. 
It toyed with him... as if the hunt itself were the purpose.

He is still alive. 
I will attempt to save him 
and learn what drives this beast 
to hunt with such cruelty.
A cave where an Aspect of the Huntsman is said to dwell.

value.label: Site of the Ritual of the Innocent Quarry

value.description: A cave where an Aspect of the Lord of the Hunt is said to dwell.
A cave where an Aspect of the Master of the Chase is said to dwell.
Track down an aspect of the Lord of the Hunt.

rulesStrings.li: questDescription -> A cave nearby is said by commonfolk to be host to the Great Hunt. Those seeking a worthy bounty should investigate.
